name: datagrid-nl2sql-v1
description: Hand-labeled text-to-SQL benchmark over the three built-in sample datasets. Gold SQL uses the {table} placeholder, substituted with the live DuckDB table name at eval time. Difficulty: simple (single filter/scan), aggregation (GROUP BY / single aggregate), complex (multi-condition or ranked aggregates).

items.question: Show all sales in the North region.
What is the total revenue by region?
items.gold_sql: SELECT region, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM {table} GROUP BY region

items.question: Which product had the highest total units sold?
items.gold_sql: SELECT product, SUM(units_sold) AS total_units FROM {table} GROUP BY product ORDER BY total_units DESC LIMIT 1

items.question: How many sales in the Electronics category had a discount greater than 10 percent?
items.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM {table} WHERE category = 'Electronics' AND discount_pct > 10

items.question: What is the average profit margin per category?
items.gold_sql: SELECT category, AVG(profit_margin) AS avg_margin FROM {table} GROUP BY category

items.question: How many employees work remotely?
items.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM {table} WHERE is_remote = TRUE

items.question: What is the average salary by department?
items.gold_sql: SELECT department, AVG(salary) AS avg_salary FROM {table} GROUP BY department

items.question: How many employees have more than 10 years of experience and a performance score above 4?
items.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM {table} WHERE years_experience > 10 AND performance_score > 4

items.question: What is the highest salary in each department?
items.gold_sql: SELECT department, MAX(salary) AS max_salary FROM {table} GROUP BY department

items.question: How many employees were hired in each year?
items.gold_sql: SELECT hire_year, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM {table} GROUP BY hire_year

items.question: What is the total amount spent per country?
items.gold_sql: SELECT country, SUM(total_amount) AS total FROM {table} GROUP BY country

items.question: How many orders were returned?
items.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM {table} WHERE returned = TRUE

items.question: What is the average rating per category?
items.gold_sql: SELECT category, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM {table} WHERE rating IS NOT NULL AND NOT isnan(rating) GROUP BY category

items.question: How many orders had more than 5 shipping days and were not returned?
items.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM {table} WHERE shipping_days > 5 AND returned = FALSE
